name: The Myrrh Suite
desc: White-washed walls and soft natural light : suited to kitchen teas, bridal showers, and intimate birthday lunches.

name: The Olive Suite
desc: A hybrid space flowing from an indoor lounge into an outdoor patio : ideal for baby showers where natural light matters.

name: The Garden Suite
desc: An open garden setting dressed with greenery and dappled shade : beautiful for larger groups celebrating in fresh air.
